body: Opus review of 317432e. grep -iE "react|tanstack|minisearch" against HEAD:docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md returns zero. Auth subsection (lines 98-110, Localhost guard + ts-net ADR-006) is byte-identical to pre-edit. Diff is surgical: area table ui row, typescript-bun subsection, ADR decision table only. Residual "Vite" token on line 52 ("existing Vite/TypeScript conventions") is outside the hard grep set but worth a tiny follow-up polish. APPROVE, leave closed.
summary: APPROVE: grep passes, auth subsection unchanged, Web UI subsection surgically rewritten
